title: Buffer Type Mismatch in Workbook.load Method of ExcelJS
author: akamini
body: Hi! 👋 Firstly, thanks for your work on this project! 🙂 Today I used [patch-package](https://github.com/ds300/patch-package) to patch `exceljs@4.4.0` for the project I'm working on. Here is the diff that solved my problem: ```diff diff --git a/node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts b/node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts index 5979806..2413f77 100644 --- a/node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts +++ b/node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts @@ -1487,7 +1487,7 @@ export interface Xlsx { * load from an array buffer * @param buffer */ - load(buffer: Buffer, options?: Partial): Promise; + load(buffer: Buffer | Buffer, options?: Partial): Promise; /** * write to a buffer ``` This issue body was [partially generated by patch-package](https://github.com/ds300/patch-package/issues/296).

comments.author: marc-niclas
comments.body:
any update on this? after switching tsconfig to esNext, I started getting this, where exceljs' `Buffer` is incompatible with node's `Buffer`
```
TS2345: Argument of type 'Buffer' is not assignable to parameter of type 'import("/Users/user/dev/app/node_modules/exceljs/index").Buffer'.
  Type 'Buffer' is missing the following properties from type 'Buffer': maxByteLength, resizable, resize, detached, and 2 more.
```

comments.author: akamini
comments.body:
Unfortunately, there has been no progress.
Therefore, we are still using this patch to address the issue.

comments.author: marc-niclas
comments.body:
I had to use a different patch:

```diff
diff --git a/node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts b/node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts
index 5979806..f090774 100644
--- a/node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts
+++ b/node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-declare interface Buffer extends ArrayBuffer { }
+// declare interface Buffer extends ArrayBuffer { }
 
 export declare enum RelationshipType {
 	None = 0,
```

Here was my error, for clarity:
```
src/handlers/whatever.ts:212:7 - error TS2322: Type 'Buffer' is not assignable to type 'Buffer | File'.
  Type 'Buffer' is missing the following properties from type 'Buffer': write, toJSON, equals, compare, and 99 more.

212       buffer = await wb.xlsx.writeBuffer();
```

comments.author: bombillazo
comments.body:
This seems to be caused by [this change](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/typescript/announcing-typescript-5-7/#support-for---target-es2024-and---lib-es2024) in TypeScript 5.7.

In my case I solved liked this:

```diff
diff --git a/node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts b/node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts
index 5979806..2413f77 100644
--- a/node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts
+++ b/node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-	declare interface Buffer extends Buffer {}
+	declare interface Buffer extends Uint8Array<ArrayBuffer> {}
```

comments.author: ExpliuM
